questions.text: Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, and specify what, if any, commercial relationship(s) your business or organisation has with Saipem and/or Subsea7.

Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition, including any views on the effect of the Acquisition on competition in Australia.

questions.section: Questions for customers or potential customers of Saipem or Subsea7
questions.text: Provide a description of the services you have acquired in APAC since 1 January 2020 in respect of: a. Design, engineering, construction, and installation of subsea infrastructure composed of subsea umbilicals, risers, and flowlines (SURF) b. Inspection, maintenance, repair, and decommissioning of offshore infrastructure (IRMD) c. Offshore wind projects

questions.section: Questions for customers or potential customers of Saipem or Subsea7
questions.text: Describe how closely Saipem and Subsea7 compete in the supply of (a) SURF, (b) IRMD and (c) Offshore Wind projects (e.g. in terms of pricing, availability of vessels, SURF capabilities, etc.), including by reference to any particular services where the removal of Subsea7 as a competitor may have a particular impact on competition and/or your business or organisation.

questions.section: Questions for customers or potential customers of Saipem or Subsea7
questions.text: Identify any alternative suppliers of the services described in Question 4 above with operations in the APAC region and/or globally, and describe how closely they compete with Saipem and/or Subsea7’s services, including by reference to factors such as capability, quality, price and availability.

questions.section: Questions for customers or potential customers of Saipem or Subsea7
questions.text: Please provide the following details in relation to each completed tender you have conducted since 1 January 2020 in the APAC region, using the below table.

questions.section: Questions for customers or potential customers of Saipem or Subsea7
questions.text: For each SURF project identified in response to Question 6, briefly outline the features of the successful tender bid(s) that were determinative when awarding the project (e.g. price, certainty of supply, technical expertise etc).

questions.section: Questions for customers or potential customers of Saipem or Subsea7
questions.text: Describe the commercial viability of your business or organisation investing in the capability to self-supply SURF, IRMD, or Offshore wind project services and/or sponsoring new entry or expansion into the supply of these services in APAC. Please also outline the circumstances under which you would consider, or have considered, such strategies.

questions.section: Questions for competitors or potential competitors of Saipem or Subsea7
questions.text: Describe the services your business or organisation supplies that compete with Saipem or Subsea7’s services, and specify which of those services your organisation currently supplies in the APAC region.

questions.section: Questions for competitors or potential competitors of Saipem or Subsea7
questions.text: Provide details of the vessels you operate globally which have capability to deliver each of (a) SURF, (b) IRMD and (c) Offshore Wind services, using the below table.

questions.section: Questions for competitors or potential competitors of Saipem or Subsea7
questions.text: Provide details of each tender your business or organisation has participated in since 1 January 2020 in the APAC region, using the below table.

questions.section: Questions for competitors or potential competitors of Saipem or Subsea7
questions.text: Identify and describe the height of barriers to entry and/or expansion in the supply of (a) SURF, (b) IRMD, and (c) Offshore Wind project services in the APAC region, including by reference to costs (such as capital expenditure and licensing fees), availability of necessary inputs (such as access to onshore infrastructure), timing, and any other factors.
